# AAA Auto Glass Auckland

> Auckland's trusted windscreen and auto glass replacement specialists with over 37 years of experience. Mobile service across Greater Auckland, OEM-quality glass, 36+ insurance partners billed direct, 7am–11pm 7 days a week. Based at 133 Pilkington Road, Panmure, Auckland 1072.

## Key Facts

- Phone: 0800 757-985
- Email: tiptopautonz@hotmail.com
- Address: 133 Pilkington Road, Panmure, Auckland 1072
- Hours: 7am–11pm, 7 days a week
- Founded: 1989
- Specialists: Tesla Model 3/Y, Range Rover, ADAS windscreens, all makes & models

## Services

- [Windscreen Replacement](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/services/windscreen-replacement.html): Full windscreen replacement for all makes and models. Same-day mobile service across Auckland.
- [ADAS Windscreen Replacement](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/services/adas-windscreen.html): Specialist replacement for vehicles with forward cameras, rain sensors, HUD, and ADAS technology.
- [Side & Rear Glass Replacement](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/services/side-rear-glass.html): Door windows, quarter glass, rear windscreens and tailgate glass.
- [Sunroof & Roof Glass Replacement](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/services/sunroof-roof-glass.html): Standard sunroof panels and full panoramic roof systems.
- [Windscreen Chip & Crack Repair](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/services/windscreen-repair.html): Resin injection for chips and small cracks. Often covered by insurance with no excess.

## Vehicle Makes Covered

- [Toyota](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/makes/index.html): Corolla, RAV4, Hilux, Prado, Land Cruiser, Camry, Yaris, Hiace, Alphard, Estima and 60+ more models
- [Nissan](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/makes/nissan.html): Navara, X-Trail, Leaf, Patrol, Skyline, GT-R, NV350 Caravan and more
- [Mazda](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/makes/mazda.html): CX-5, CX-3, Mazda3, BT-50, MX-5, Demio and more
- [Ford](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/makes/ford.html): Ranger, Everest, Mustang, Focus, Transit and more

## Insurance Partners

- [Insurance Claims Centre](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/insurance/index.html): We handle direct billing with 36+ NZ insurers including AA Insurance, AMI, State, Vero, NZI, QBE, IAG, FMG, Lumley, Zurich and many more.

## Coverage Areas

Auckland-wide mobile service: North Shore, Central Auckland, West Auckland, East Auckland, South Auckland, Rodney & Hibiscus Coast. Key suburbs include Takapuna, Albany, Henderson, Howick, Manukau, Orewa, Panmure and 140+ more.

## About

- [About AAA Auto Glass](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/about.html): Family-owned Auckland auto glass business since 1989. Located at 133 Pilkington Road, Panmure.

## Blog

- [What is an ADAS Windscreen?](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/blog/what-is-adas-windscreen.html): Guide to ADAS camera systems, rain sensors, HUD and windscreen technology.
- [How to Make a Windscreen Insurance Claim in NZ](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/blog/insurance-claim-guide.html): Step-by-step guide to claiming windscreen damage on NZ insurance.
- [5 Ways to Make Your Windscreen Last Longer](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/blog/windscreen-care-tips.html): Practical tips for Auckland drivers.
- [When Should You Replace Your Windscreen?](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/blog/when-to-replace-windscreen.html): Guide to assessing chip and crack damage.
- [How to File a Windscreen Insurance Claim NZ](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/blog/how-to-file-windscreen-insurance-claim-nz.html): Step-by-step guide to filing a windscreen insurance claim in NZ.
- [Same-Day Windscreen Replacement Auckland](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/blog/same-day-windscreen-replacement-auckland.html): How same-day windscreen replacement works in Auckland.
- [Windscreen Replacement Cost Auckland 2025](https://www.aaaautoglass.co.nz/blog/windscreen-replacement-cost-auckland.html): Complete 2025 guide to windscreen replacement costs in Auckland.
